display_text: Visage Aghanim's Scepter: Silent as the Grave — Provides invisibility and flying movement to Visage and familiars, countering vision-based detection and terrain obstacles. Upon breaking invisibility, the damage burst allows for surprise engagements or disengagements, shifting Visage into a high-mobility ambush predator.
search_text: Visage Aghanim Scepter invisibility flying movement surprise burst anti-vision terrain ambush

display_text: Visage Aghanim's Shard: Gravekeeper's Cloak — Grants a strong self-sustain ability, countering burst damage and poke-heavy lineups. This transforms Visage into a more durable frontliner or split-pusher, reducing reliance on external healing sources.
search_text: Visage Aghanim Shard sustain anti-burst durability self-heal split-push
